codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly satisfies all feature requirements. The Release Versions bounded context has been implemented via domain use-cases, a Prisma repository with an atomic set-default transaction, and the workspace VersionsController with correct REST paths and RBAC decorators (@Author). Unit and e2e tests cover the duplicate key conflicts (409) and the atomic single-default invariant.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker batched implementation and tests instead of strictly following the red-first TDD sequencing documented in AGENTS.md, citing the overhead of non-interactive mode.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: handoff.skillFeedback.deviations confirms the worker implemented and tested in close succession rather than strict red-first TDD.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker suggested adding explicit 'targeted jest invocation' examples for PowerShell to the skill, as forwarding `--testPathPattern` through pnpm scripts can be shell-sensitive on Windows.

summary: Feature successfully implemented with full test coverage and atomic transaction logic.
